falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 79% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug assumed a higher low structure; a break below 4,800 would violate the August 2024 floor and invalidate the bottoming pattern thesis, suggesting continuation lower rather than accumulation

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained VIX spike above 35 would indicate panic-level volatility inconsistent with a bottom formation; the August 2024 bottom featured VIX peaking at 38.6 then rapidly mean-reverting, so persistent elevation would signal a different regime (capitulation/liquidation) rather than the expected stabilization

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts further below -50bps (more negative than -0.50%) and holds for 5+ consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom occurred with curve steepening from deeply inverted levels as recession fears peaked; further deepening inversion would indicate deteriorating growth expectations and financial conditions tightening, contradicting the 'bottom' signal which requires easing financial conditions and improving forward growth pricing

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
